economic_notes: GBEs include Black Lake Ventures LP (99.99%), Black Lake Ventures Ltd (100%), Black Lake Development Corporation (100%), Elizabeth Falls Hydro LP (99.99%), Elizabeth Falls Hydro Corporation (100%). GBEs reported combined net loss of $1,181,677 in 2021. Elizabeth Falls Hydro LP generates hydro revenue. First Nation is member of PAGC, ADCFS, AHA, and AERC.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021; audit report dated October 31, 2022 (significant delay). Five GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis; Black Lake Ventures LP reported large equity loss of $1,185,984. Revenue includes $4,373,805 of prior year unexpended funds transferred in, which significantly inflates revenue. Long-term debt includes both First Nations Bank loans ($2,677,401) and CMHC mortgages ($6,166,332). Annual debt service calculated as LTD repayment $541,262 + CMHC repayment $367,289 = $908,551. Deferred revenue total $4,982,912 (ISC $4,683,203 + non-ISC $299,709). Total government transfers estimated as ISC $19,456,537 + AHA $2,508,746 + CMHC $505,326 + PAGC $755,961 + FNT $493,558 + Athabasca Education Authority $104,466 + trust funds $20,729 = $23,845,323 minus equity losses and non-government items; OSR estimated conservatively. Capital asset additions of $7,885,850 in year.
